sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89968" key="prospleona/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπλεονάζω</orth>, <sense id="n89968.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be specially frequent</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prevalent</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν θέρει</foreign> Dem. Ophth. ap. Aë.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
